Electronics._note: High carbon: manufacturing a phone/laptop emits ~70kg CO2; saving 18kg is conservative refurb credit. Return shipping ~0.9kg CO2 (heavier parcel, longer avg distance).

Footwear._note: Shoe manufacture ~14kg CO2; 2.4kg saved by diverting from landfill. Return shipping ~0.5kg CO2 per parcel.

Apparel._note: Textile production ~27kg CO2 per kg fabric; garment diversion saves ~3.5kg. Lighter parcel: 0.4kg return shipping CO2.

Home & Kitchen._note: Appliance manufacture is energy-intensive. Bulkier return parcel: ~1.2kg return shipping CO2.

Books._note: Paper production ~1kg CO2 per book. Light parcel: ~0.3kg return shipping CO2.

Toys._note: Mixed plastics manufacture. Safety check required. ~0.5kg return shipping CO2.

Sports._note: Equipment varies widely; mid-range processing and shipping costs.

Beauty._note: Sealed/unopened only. No refurbish path. Light parcel: ~0.3kg return CO2.

Automotive._note: High carbon saving for parts diversion. Heavy return parcel: ~1.5kg CO2.
